title: Decrypt Create
body:
# **Decrypt: Create**

Lightweight Create focused modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 put together for Decrypt Create SMP.

Included in the server is unique world generation, quality of life changes, improved inventory management, villages, food, plushies and more, while maintaining a feel for the Create experience. Perfect pack for those new to Create, and experienced players too! Lastly, a couple of mods for those that love to build have been included, allowing you to let your imagination run wild with a selection of new blocks, furniture and shapes.

**Primary mods included client side:**
- Alex's Mobs
- Better Archeology
- [Bobby Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bobby-reforged)
- Farmers Delight
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- Create
- Create: Deco
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- [Create: Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)
- Create: Stuff & Additions
- [Create: Teleporters!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-teleporters)
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: Connected
- Create: CopyCats+
- Create: Design N' Decor
- Create: Liquid Fuel
- Create: Misc and Things
- Create: Power Loader
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Chipped
- Rechiseled: Create
- Framed Blocks
- Macaw's Bridges, Trapdoors, Doors, Fences and Walls
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- JEI/EMI
- Storage Drawers
  
A lot more not included on this list to include more building and gameplay improvements along with increased performance
